text.title: Tech-Debt Budget for Solos Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: cap_percent > 20; impact below minimum; interest above maximum; decision not in enum; owner plural; last_signed_utc empty.

list.pattern: cap_percent > 20 without an explicit policy exception.
items deferred indefinitely with no ship / pay / monitor decision.
